title: noccaea kovatsii
intro: Noccaea kovatsii, also known as Kovats' penny-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Noccaea kovatsii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Noccaea kovatsii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
